metadata.name: AnimalCareTables
metadata.notes: Baseline animal-care and smallholder butchery tables to drive synthesis, validation, and scheduling. Always defer to the product label, veterinarian guidance, and local regulations. Values are conservative defaults intended for planning—not a substitute for veterinary care.

brooderCurves._comment: Target floor-level brooder temps (measured at chick height) and weekly reductions. Provide warm/cool escape zones; watch behavior to fine-tune.

notes: Reduce if chicks spread far from heat or pant
Provide non-slip, dry bedding; avoid soaking
Turkeys are sensitive early; ensure easy feed/water access
Fine mesh for feeders/drinkers; avoid drafts

brooderChecklist: Thermometer at chick level + behavior check
24–48h extra feeders/drinkers on paper to teach pecking
Dry litter, change wet spots daily

milkReplacer._comment: Mixing and feeding temperature targets; verify label solids % and species-specific osmolality recommendations.

notes: Mix thoroughly, then cool to feed temp
Consistent timing and volume reduce scours
Smaller, frequent feeds early; sanitize nipples and bottles
Warm, draft-free pen; do not over-concentrate
Offer fresh often; discard leftovers; creep feed transition by week 2–3

sanitation: Wash bottles/nipples with hot water + detergent
transitionHints: Introduce starter feed as per label

dipProtocols._comment: Hygiene dips for navels (neonates) and teats (dairy). Contact time means visibly wet for the full duration; follow label.

notes: Fully coat stump and base; avoid ingestion; provide dry bedding
Alternative when iodine not available; stain-free

footbath._comment: Herd-level hoof hygiene; maintain solution and keep traffic calm.

butcheryChillTargets._comment: Smallholder chilling targets for food safety planning. Comply with local inspection rules where applicable.

notes: Agitate chill tank; change water to manage load
Alternatively use refrigerated air with humidity control
Avoid cold shortening (pre-rigor below ~10°C); use stepwise chill where possible
Rinse, drain, rapid chill; store separately from carcasses

waterersAndThermal._comment: Drinker temperature ranges improve intake and reduce chilling stress.
waterersAndThermal.summerElectrolyteHint: Short-term electrolytes during heat spikes; follow label.

cleaningAndSanitation._comment: Cross-link to CleaningContactTimes when available; provide minimal fallbacks here.

plannerHints._comment: Helpers for synthesis engines to create steps/sessions and validation checks.
safety: Never mix chemicals; read label PPE
Discard leftover milk replacer after feed
Keep neonates dry and out of drafts
